creator: tony@git-pull.com
text:
Maybe related: bug #201543. Process still runs at 100%, but no window opens.

Anything else in mind I can try to squeeze info out of this?

$ freebsd-version -ku; uname -apKU
10.1-RELEASE-p17
10.1-RELEASE-p16
FreeBSD z600 10.1-RELEASE-p17 FreeBSD 10.1-RELEASE-p17 #1: Fri Aug  7 00:06:34 CDT 2015     root@z600:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/MYKERNEL  amd64 amd64 1001000 1001000


tony at z600 in ~
